title: Black Legion
writer: Abem Finkel, William Wister Haines, Robert Lord
actors: Humphrey Bogart, Ann Sheridan, Dick Foran
plot: A hard-working machinist loses a promotion to a Polish-born worker, he's seduced into joining the secretive Black Legion, which intimidates foreigners through violence.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 1 nomination total
